name: TTArtisan Tilt 50mm f1.4
description: Bringing advanced focus control to the masses, the TTArtisan Tilt 50mm f/1.4 Lens is an otherwise conventional, normal length prime lens for full-frame Sony E-mount cameras.

features.Key Features:: Full-Frame | f/1.4 to f/16 | Normal Length Prime Lens | Focus Control with Tilt Mechanism | Manual Focus Design | Two High Refractive Index Elements | All Metal Construction
features.What's In The Box?: TTArtisan Tilt 50mm f/1.4 Lens | Front Cap | Rear Cap
